title: Malty Energizing Brazilian Cauliflower Skillet
description: A paleo-friendly Brazilian dish featuring cauliflower, with a malty and energizing flavor profile, made using sous-vide cooking techniques.
instructions: Preheat the sous-vide machine to 180 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the cauliflower florets with coconut oil, salt, and black pepper.
Seal the cauliflower mixture in a sous-vide bag and cook for 30 minutes.
In a small saucepan, combine malt syrup, garlic, and lime juice, and cook over medium heat for 5 minutes.
Remove the cauliflower from the sous-vide bag and add it to the saucepan with the malt syrup mixture.
Stir in chicken broth and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
Serve the malty cauliflower skillet hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
